principle: Vercel hosts the OS routing layer; external platforms require owner credentials and must be connected in their own dashboards.

platforms.name: Canvas
platforms.connectionUse: Course modules, onboarding, youth programs, Avalon learning paths.
handoffRequired: API token only if backend integration is approved
platforms.safeNextStep: Create Canvas course/module links and add public URLs to the OS hub.

platforms.name: GDevelop
platforms.connectionUse: Export Lingo.ai or minigames to HTML5 and deploy under /site/lingoai/ or /games/.
platforms.safeNextStep: Export HTML5 build and replace the current prototype game scaffold.

platforms.name: GoDaddy
platforms.connectionUse: Optional registrar/DNS connection if domains are managed there.
platforms.safeNextStep: Keep thelingolegacy.com on Vercel-assigned DNS records; do not change nameservers unless intentionally migrating DNS.

platforms.name: Square
platforms.connectionUse: POS, merch sales, event checkout, vendor lane payments.
handoffRequired: catalog export or public checkout links
location IDs if backend integration is approved
platforms.safeNextStep: Add public Square checkout/catalog links to merch and vendor pages.

platforms.name: Wix
platforms.connectionUse: Legacy page migration, content references, or redirect source.
platforms.safeNextStep: Inventory Wix pages and decide whether to redirect, rebuild, or archive.

platforms.name: SoFi
platforms.connectionUse: External funding source feeding launch runway or Stripe balance.
platforms.safeNextStep: Document only transfer policy; never store bank data in repository.

platforms.name: Chime
platforms.connectionUse: External funding source for launch cushion or operator expenses.
platforms.safeNextStep: Document only transfer policy; never store bank data in repository.

platforms.name: Apple
platforms.connectionUse: Apple Pay via Stripe and future Apple Developer/App Store distribution.
handoffRequired: Apple Developer account for App Store
app bundle details when mobile app exists
platforms.safeNextStep: Verify thelingolegacy.com in Stripe for Apple Pay; App Store work begins after mobile build exists.

platforms.name: Google Play
platforms.connectionUse: Google Pay via Stripe and future Google Play distribution.
handoffRequired: Android app package when mobile build exists
platforms.safeNextStep: Enable Google Pay in Stripe; Google Play work begins after Android build exists.
